settings.heading: PROTEIN BARS MADE FOR INGREDIENT-OBSESSED PEOPLE
settings.text: We believe in fueling you with clean ingredients and high protein in every bite because what you put in your body should make sense

settings.heading: WHY WE EXIST
settings.text:
Many products prioritize taste or trends over how food actually makes people feel. JustNosh was founded to provide high-protein snacks made with intention, using ingredients you recognize, trust, and can digest.

Our focus is simple: protein-forward products built with ingredient integrity. No fillers. No artificial flavors. No unnecessary extras. Just ingredients that earn their place in every bar.

settings.heading: WHAT WE STAND FOR
settings.text:
Ingredient sourcing matters to us. Wherever possible, we choose organically sourced ingredients because it aligns with our standards for quality and transparency.
Not as a trend, but as a baseline. Not every ingredient is certified organic, but every ingredient is chosen deliberately.

settings.heading: WHY COLLAGEN PROTEIN
settings.lead: We use 100% grass-fed collagen peptides as our featured protein source because of their unique amino acid profile.
settings.text:
Collagen is naturally rich in glycine, proline, and hydroxyproline, amino acids that are found in high concentrations in structural tissues and are less abundant in many common protein sources.

Collagen functions differently from muscle-focused proteins like whey or soy and is not considered a complete protein. We choose it intentionally as part of a protein-forward, ingredient-conscious approach that complements a varied diet rather than replacing other protein types.

settings.heading: OUR STORY
settings.text:
"Protein bars have always been part of my everyday. I love the convenience, the structure, and the role they play in supporting my health goals, but I struggled to find options that actually felt good to eat.

I created JustNosh to change that. What started as a collagen-forward, easy-to-digest protein bar quickly became something more. A brand rooted in ingredient quality, transparency, and respect for how food impacts the body. Every product is made without fillers, artificial flavors, or ingredients commonly associated with digestive discomfort.
settings.highlight: My mission goes beyond the product. It's to empower consumers to understand what they're eating and why it matters."
